mapper.sql: id, business_type, err_type, api_name, status, handle_status, msg_id, input_msg, output_msg, parameter_1, parameter_2, parameter_3, parameter_4, parameter_5, parameter_6, parameter_7, parameter_8, parameter_9, remark, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, read_qty
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_exception_handle
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_exception_handle (id, business_type, err_type, api_name, status, handle_status, msg_id, input_msg, output_msg, parameter_1, parameter_2, parameter_3, parameter_4, parameter_5, parameter_6, parameter_7, parameter_8, parameter_9, remark, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, read_qty ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{apiName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{handleStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{msgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inputMsg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{outputMsg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{parameter1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter7,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter8,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parameter9,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{readQty,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

update dbo.ops_exception_handle
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
business_type = #{record.businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
err_type = #{record.errType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
